title: OMP-Low
description: OMP-Low a perfect modpack for survival players with surreal terrain gen and many features to improve your boring vanilla world and make it feel more lively and immersive.
body:
# Ohh-My-Pcc: Minecraft Reborn in Uncompromising Realism

**Vanilla's great. But after a while, it gets old.**

**OMP-Low** doesn't reinvent Minecraft — it just makes it feel alive again.

*Custom terrain that actually surprises you, features that make survival feel like it matters, and nothing that doesn't belong.*

>* No mod lists that take 20 minutes to read. No systems that need a wiki to understand.*

Just Minecraft, but the version you always wished existed.*

**If that sounds like your thing, you're in the right place.**


## Known Issues

Even with heavy optimization, OMP pushes Minecraft beyond its comfort zone. The following issues are expected depending on your hardware tier:

### World Generation
- First-time world creation may freeze for several seconds to minutes.
- Large structures or extreme terrain stacks can cause temporary “Not Responding” states.
- Biome borders in mixed-tier custom setups may appear abrupt.

### Performance & Stability
- FPS drops during rapid biome transitions.
- Occasional stutters when loading heavy foliage or complex rock formations.
- Rare out-of-memory crashes if RAM allocation is below recommended values.

### Visual & Shader Issues
- Certain shaders may produce lighting glitches in worlds.
- Shadow artifacts may appear on extremely steep terrain.
- Fog and cloud layers can behave inconsistently with custom sky mods.

  ### OMP-Low System Requirements

| Category | Minimum | Recommended | Optimal |
|---------|----------|-------------|---------|
| **CPU** | Intel i5 8th Gen or equivalent | Intel i5 10th Gen / Ryzen 3 | Intel i7 / Ryzen 5 or higher |
| **RAM (System)** | 8 GB | 12 GB | 16 GB+ |
| **RAM Allocated to MC** | 5–6 GB | 6–7 GB | 7–8 GB |
| **GPU** | Modern iGPU (Intel UHD / Vega) | GTX 1650 / RX6600 | RTX 3050 / RX 6600+ |


## Support & Contact

If you need help, want to report an issue, or have suggestions for improvement, the official support channel is available below.

### Discord Support
Join the official OMP Discord server for:
- Bug reports
- Crash/support help
- Feature requests
- Announcements
- Direct communication with the developer

**Discord server link:** [Ohh-My-Pcc](https://discord.gg/us9fkJW7BW)

### How to Report Issues
When reporting a problem, please include:
- Modpack version
- Minecraft version
- Your system specs (CPU, GPU, RAM allocated)
- Log files (`latest.log` or crash report)
- What you were doing before the issue occurred

This helps ensure faster and more accurate support.

## Credits

A huge thank you to everyone who contributed to the development, testing, and overall vision of the OMP project.

### Development
- **DhoklaGamers** – Creator, lead developer, performance tuning, visual design, systems engineering.

### Testing & Community Feedback
- Community testers who reported bugs, performance issues, and suggested improvements.

### Tools & Platforms
- **Modrinth** – Hosting and distribution.
- **Minecraft Modding Community** – Compatibility insights, open-source references, and general inspiration.

### Special Thanks
- Everyone who downloaded, tested, or supported the project.
- The larger Minecraft community for keeping innovation alive.
